{ "name": "yallist", "version": "3.1.1", "description": "Yet Another Linked List", "main": "yallist.js", "directories": { "test": "test" }, "files": [ "yallist.js", "iterator.js" ], "dependencies": {}, "devDependencies": { "tap": "^12.1.0" }, "scripts": { "test": "tap test/*.js --100", "preversion": "npm test", "postversion": "npm publish", "postpublish": "git push origin --all; git push origin --tags" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/isaacs/yallist.git" }, "author": "Isaac Z. Schlueter <i@izs.me> (http://blog.izs.me/)", "license": "ISC" }
